# Date filters

## Has due date

```tasks
has due date
```

## No due date

```tasks
no due date
```

## Due before tomorrow

```tasks
due before tomorrow
```

## Due after today

```tasks
due after today
```

## Due in the next week (before 2026-05-18)

```tasks
due before 2026-05-18
not done
```

## Scheduled on a specific date

```tasks
scheduled on 2026-05-13
```

## NL date — before next monday

```tasks
due before next monday
not done
```

## Created date present

```tasks
has created date
```

## Done date after 2025-01-01

```tasks
done date after 2025-01-01
```

## Cancelled date present

```tasks
has cancelled date
```
